title: SVSU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Resident Medical Officer Posts
description: The Shri Vishwakarma Skill University (SVSU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies for 01 Resident Medical Officer posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS can apply for the SVSU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection process, application ...
